metadata.name: Handle a Client Complaint about Billing

description: A client has called to complain about the amount of their latest invoice, questioning the time spent on a task.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the invoice in question and the detailed time entries associated with it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the bill and the underlying time records.

nodes.task_description: Review the detailed descriptions for the time entries to understand the work that was performed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the context of the charges.

nodes.task_description: Explain the value of the work performed to the client and, if authorized by a partner, offer a small courtesy write-off to maintain goodwill.

expected_outcome.value: Agent professionally handles the complaint and resolves the issue.
